title: [codereview-2] parse_*_logs still use full read_text() after telemetry change
description: The three parse functions still load entire content with read_text() before calling updated parse_telemetry. This defeats streaming. Need to open file and pass line iterator. Also fix duplicate splitlines() loops into single streaming pass. P1 safety. codereview-tagged.
close_reason: All three parse_*_logs now use with open() + file iterator for parse_telemetry and parse_legacy_logs. No more read_text() or full splitlines(). Single/fallback pass streaming implemented. Fixed P3 memory bug.
